title: Casual Chat at a Party
opening: Hi there! How was your weekend?

t1.prompt: Hi there! How was your weekend?
t1.promptTranslation: Hi there! How was your weekend?

t2a.prompt: That sounds nice! Did you do anything interesting or watch any good movies?
t2a.promptTranslation: That sounds nice! Did you do anything interesting or watch any good movies?

t2b.prompt: Oh, I understand. Weekends can be like that. Do you have any favorite hobbies or TV shows you're following?
t2b.promptTranslation: Oh, I understand. Weekends can be like that. Do you have any favorite hobbies or TV shows you're following?

t3a_movie.prompt: Oh really? What have you watched recently? Anything you'd recommend?
t3a_movie.promptTranslation: Oh really? What have you watched recently? Anything you'd recommend?

t3b_hobby.prompt: That's cool! Tell me more about it. What do you enjoy most about it?
t3b_hobby.promptTranslation: That's cool! Tell me more about it. What do you enjoy most about it?

t3c_nothing.prompt: No worries, sometimes it's good to just relax. Do you have any plans for the next weekend?
t3c_nothing.promptTranslation: No worries, sometimes it's good to just relax. Do you have any plans for the next weekend?

t4a_movie_detail.prompt: Sounds interesting! I'll have to add it to my watch list. Anyway, it was nice chatting with you!
t4a_movie_detail.promptTranslation: Sounds interesting! I'll have to add it to my watch list. Anyway, it was nice chatting with you!

t4b_hobby_detail.prompt: That's really cool, I can see why you enjoy it. I've always wanted to try something like that. Well, it was nice chatting with you!
t4b_hobby_detail.promptTranslation: That's really cool, I can see why you enjoy it. I've always wanted to try something like that. Well, it was nice chatting with you!

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat what you said?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat what you said?

t-end.prompt: It was nice chatting with you! I hope you have a great rest of your day. Goodbye!
t-end.promptTranslation: It was nice chatting with you! I hope you have a great rest of your day. Goodbye!
